scripts.title: Offer Scripts
scripts.subtitle: Generate scripts to add upsells and downsells to your external pages
scripts.how_to_use_desc: Copy the script and paste it on your thank you pages, member area or any external page.
scripts.auto_detect: The script automatically detects if the visitor just made a purchase (via purchase_id in the URL) and displays the offer.
scripts.upsell_desc: To offer complementary products after purchase
scripts.downsell_desc: To recover clients who declined the upsell
scripts.tip1: First configure your offers in Products → Checkout → Offers & Funnel
scripts.tip2: The script only appears if the visitor has a valid purchase_id in the URL
scripts.tip3: Use upsell on the thank you page and downsell on a separate page
scripts.tip4: The script doesn't show the same offer twice (uses localStorage)

setup.title: 📋 Setup Instructions
setup.cloudflare_desc: We now use Cloudflare Workers to automatically support custom domains!
setup.step1: Purchase a domain from a registrar (e.g.: GoDaddy, Namecheap, Google Domains)
setup.step2: Configure a CNAME record pointing to our proxy:
setup.step3: Add your domain here on Clicknich using the "Add Domain" button
setup.step4: Wait for DNS propagation (usually 15 minutes to 2 hours)
setup.adv_setup: One-time setup — no need to manually add each domain

modal.title: Add Domain
modal.domain_hint: Enter only the domain, without https:// or www
